fund_management.name: Arun Agarwal
fund_management.bio: Education: Mr. Agarwal is a B.Com. and Chartered Accountant. Experience: Prior to joining HDFC Asset Management Company Limited, he has worked with SBI Funds Management Pvt. Ltd., ICICI Bank Limited, UTI Asset Management Pvt. Ltd.

fund_management.name: Nandita Menezes
fund_management.bio: Education: CA (ICAI, INDIA), B.Com (University of Mumbai). Experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC, she was associated with S.V. Ghatalia & Associates LLP.
